'''''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1''' was the first issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire]]'' series of comics. It was released [[January 27]], [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Before the events of ''A New Hope'', Darth Vader employed the galaxy's greatest bounty hunter on a search-and-retrieval mission: Boba Fett must discover and return to Vader a single small box, the contents of which could change the fate of the galaxy. For such an important mission, Vader cannot rely on a single operative… nor can he allow that operative to walk away alive!''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
It is noted in the 2005 ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' (p. 62) that this is the first meeting between an adult Boba and [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] in the [[Dark Horse Comics]] [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] timeline. Although Boba (technically) met Anakin when he was a kid on Geonosis after his 'father' Jango helped captured [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé]], and Anakin (when still a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] to Obi-Wan), for the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian's]] and [[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku]] as leader of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|Separatists]], this is also the first Legends comic storyline that portrays Boba as an adult.
